title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 429.130 - Penalty for refusing to satisfy
text:
429.130.  Penalty for refusing to satisfy. — If any creditor refuse to enter satisfaction within ten days after payment and request, as aforesaid, he shall be liable to any person injured, to the amount of such injury and cost of suit.
(RSMo 1939 § 3564) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3174; 1919 § 7234; 1909 § 8230
